key_findings.individual_positions: NOT publicly accessible. SFTR and EMIR individual transaction/position data is confidential, available only to national/European authorities.
key_findings.aggregated_stats: Weekly aggregated statistics published by Trade Repositories covering broad asset classes (Equities, Interest Rates, etc.)
key_findings.ticker_transparency: Ticker-level data (e.g. GME) is NOT disclosed in public aggregate reports. Positions grouped by asset class only.
key_findings.gme_inference: Connection to GME can only be inferred by matching timing of "Equities" notional spikes with GME market events.

icma_sftr.description: ICMA aggregates SFTR data from all TRs (DTCC, Regis-TR, KDPW). Includes total loan values, transaction counts, collateral types.
icma_sftr.coverage: Securities Financing (repos, lending) — GME lending would be here

dtcc_emir.description: DTCC GTR publishes aggregate EMIR reports including Open Positions and Transaction Volumes by asset class.
dtcc_emir.coverage: OTC Derivatives (equity swaps/TRS) — GME swaps would be here
dtcc_emir.note: DTCC Ireland (DDRIE) in Dublin cited by researchers for equity notional spikes

regis_tr.description: European TR with downloadable weekly CSV/ZIP of aggregated SFTR and EMIR data.

reporting_split.sftr: Securities lending involving GME reported here
reporting_split.emir: Equity swap/CFD positions (Total Return Swaps) reported here

nscc_pqd.note: Previous download was a 500 error HTML page. Correct filename uses hyphens and includes "Public".
